# tenableio_tag_categories (Data Source)

Retrieves a list of tag categories from Tenable.io.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# List all tag categories
data "tenableio_tag_categories" "all" {}

output "category_names" {
  value = [for c in data.tenableio_tag_categories.all.categories : c.name]
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->

- `categories` (Attributes List) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--categories))
